template:
Load the ai-champions skill with skill(name="ai-champions") and run the full workflow. Arguments: $ARGUMENTS

Follow the skill instructions precisely:
1. Read #ai-champions Slack channel, find Simon's latest weekly brief
2. Show the task to the user and confirm before proceeding
3. Implement the task, asking for user feedback at key decision points
4. Draft a succinct, human-readable Slack submission (one message, ~300 words max)
5. Show the draft to the user and get approval before posting
6. Post exactly one message to #ai-champions (channel ID: C0AJ3CLSGBX)

Do not post to Slack without user confirmation. Do not send more than one message.
description: Read Simon's latest AI Champions task, implement it with user feedback, and post a single succinct result to #ai-champions
